strengths: Strong Python and SQL data engineering skills
Experience with BigQuery, dbt, Airflow, and ELT pipelines
Implemented CI/CD and data quality (GitHub Actions, Great Expectations)
Quantified impact in past roles (efficiency and lead increases)
weaknesses: Less than the requested 8+ years of software engineering

No demonstrated LLM/agentic AI or RAG projects
Not clearly shown founding/0→1 startup ownership
improvement_bullets: Collaborated with stakeholders at Haven Technologies to architect financial data workflows, specifically translating complex private credit and asset management requirements into scalable backend features.

Architected and deployed a modular data pipeline using Python, demonstrating 0→1 development capability by transitioning a manual legacy spreadsheet process into an automated, high-throughput cloud data platform.

Engineered a RAG-based proof-of-concept utilizing Python and LLM integrations to automate the parsing and classification of unstructured investment documents, significantly reducing manual data extraction time.
Led the end-to-end development of a CI/CD-integrated backend system for an internal fintech application, ensuring high data integrity and synchronization across complex relational databases.
Built and maintained robust data infrastructure for high-stakes environments, consistently optimizing for performance and scalability to support real-time investment analytics.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Founding Software Engineer opportunity with Rengo AI. I am interested in this opportunity because of Rengo AI’s mission to modernize the $24T alternative investment market, a space currently hindered by fragmented legacy workflows. What interests me about working for Rengo AI is its ambitious approach to building a foundational data platform that empowers investors through AI and structured data, which excites me because of my own background in engineering scalable ELT pipelines and data-driven solutions. I believe my expertise in architecting complex data infrastructure and my experience in rapid, product-focused development would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by prioritizing both technical scalability and direct stakeholder impact. In fact, while at Haven Technologies (MassMutual), I collaborated with business stakeholders to translate raw API data into structured datasets for front-end development. This effort synchronized data across critical systems, resulting in a 60% improvement in data accuracy and a 15% increase in feature adoption by internal users. Ultimately, I know that the Founding Software Engineer role at Rengo AI would allow me to bring my deep data modeling experience to architect the core infrastructure that will define the firm's growth. Additionally, my recent project work building a production-grade ELT pipeline with BigQuery and Airflow enabled me to develop my 0→1 engineering skills. In that project, I took the entire build from concept to production-ready status, including implementing Great Expectations for data quality validation and GitHub Actions for CI/CD, which drastically reduced analyst query time. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python-based backend development in working on the core infrastructure and LLM-enabled workflows at Rengo AI. I know that my technical proficiency in data engineering and my startup-minded approach to problem-solving align with what it takes to succeed as a founding member of the team. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
